name: Journal Reflection
summary: Reads new daily journal entries, grounds against the vault, writes a coach reflection back into the same note.

name: Journal Rescan
summary: Manually re-run the reflection on a specific date and refresh the Coach section in place.

name: Weekly Pattern Digest
summary: Optional weekly digest of recurring journal themes. Off by default.

name: Email Digest
summary: Priority-tiered digest of unread email with adaptive sender scoring.

name: Overdue Invoice Reminders
summary: Tiered overdue-invoice email reminders with exclusion list + cooldowns.

name: Invoice Template Build
summary: Generate the HTML invoice template artifact + save business config during persona build.

name: Inbox Triage & messaging Routing
summary: Classify each unread email and post a summary to the topic-matched messaging channels.

name: knowledge base Databases Tracking
summary: Write a structured tracking row to knowledge base for every classified email.

name: Submission Intake & Scoring
summary: Webhook+poll intake with contextual scoring and CRM upsert.

name: Personalized Welcome Email
summary: Tier-appropriate welcome email generation + email send.

name: Stage Response
summary: Stage-specific email + team message per CRM transition.

name: Niche Business Discovery
summary: Maps + directory discovery with website scoring and persistent prospect storage.

name: Deadline Check
summary: Tiered reminders with milestone/completion detection across active checklists.

name: New Hire Checklist Setup
summary: HR-database poll that spins up a role-adaptive knowledge base onboarding checklist for each new hire.

name: Weekly Progress Report
summary: Weekly summary with at-risk flagging and bottleneck analysis.

name: Pre-Meeting Reminder
summary: T-30 one-line behavioral brief delivered via messaging.

name: Longitudinal Log
summary: Logs each daily briefing to a KB entry for longitudinal search.

name: Offer Approval & Dispatch
summary: Draft offer email, route for human approval, dispatch on approval.

name: Stage Transition Processing
summary: Poll HR platform, send stage-appropriate candidate email, post messaging update.

name: Feed Scanning
summary: Daily RSS/Atom feed scan → batched curation with age + dedup filters.

name: Manual Curation
summary: On-demand URL → structured KB page with three-tier summary + cross-references.

name: Manage Rules
summary: Natural-language routing-rule editor with diff confirmation.

name: Proposal Generation
summary: Tiered proposal generation with live research + knowledge base delivery + mandatory review gate.

name: Realtime Push Scan
summary: Push-triggered security scanner scan with Jira dedup, ticket creation, and severity-routed messaging alerts.

name: Regression Handling
summary: Reopen closed Jira tickets on CVE re-introduction and alert loudly regardless of severity.

name: Scheduled Full Scan
summary: Full-org security scanner sweep with bulk Jira dedup, batch ticket creation, and a single digest message.

name: Free Promotion Source Discovery
summary: Weekly discovery of free promotion surfaces grounded in the app's README + package metadata, with good/bad tagging memory.

name: 3-Pass Cut Edit
summary: Local 3-pass FFmpeg edit with Deepgram-guided retake removal.

name: Outline + Titles
summary: 5-section outline + 3 title variants + thumbnail direction from approved topic.

name: Publish Prep
summary: YouTube-ready title/description/tags/chapters/community post.

name: Teleprompter Script
summary: Voice-matched teleprompter script with revision learning.

name: On-Demand Security Scan
summary: Scan the codebase for dependency CVEs, secrets, and risky patterns; file severity-ranked findings with fixes, deduped via memory.
